summary: Completed testing of NOC Alert Command Center new features: Connectors page, Mobile bottom navigation, PWA manifest, and Connector ZIP download. All backend APIs (10/10) and frontend features working correctly.

console_warnings.message: React setState warning in LoginPage during render - minor issue, does not affect functionality
Recharts chart width/height warning - chart container sizing issue during initial render
WebSocket connection closes before established - expected behavior during page navigation

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/connector/status returns connector data without _id field
Backend: GET /api/stats/summary returns stats data without _id field
Backend: Login with admin@test.it / TestAdmin123! succeeds
Backend: GET /api/alerts returns alerts list
Backend: GET /api/clients returns clients list
Backend: GET /api/devices returns devices list
Backend: GET /api/stats/trends returns trend data
Backend: PWA manifest.json served at /manifest.json
Backend: 86NocConnector.zip available at /86NocConnector.zip
Frontend: Login flow works - redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard loads with severity cards (critical, high, medium, low)
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (Alert Attivi, Clienti, Dispositivi)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Trend 24h chart
Frontend: Dashboard shows Live Stream section
Frontend: Dashboard shows Connettori Attivi section
Frontend: Dashboard shows recent alerts table
Frontend: Connectors page at /connectors loads correctly
Frontend: Connectors page shows summary cards (Totale, Online, Offline)
Frontend: Connectors page shows connector list with status
Frontend: Sidebar navigation includes 'Connettori' link
Frontend: Mobile bottom navigation bar visible at viewport < 768px
Frontend: Mobile nav tabs present (Home, Alert, Clienti, Dispositivi, Altro)
Frontend: Mobile navigation works correctly
Frontend: Mobile sidebar opens on menu button click
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning: setState called during render in LoginPage - consider moving navigation logic to useEffect
Recharts chart sizing warning during initial render - consider adding explicit minWidth/minHeight to chart containers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Connectors page at /connectors shows connector status with summary cards (Totale, Online, Offline) and connector list. 2) Mobile bottom navigation bar appears at viewport < 768px with tabs: Home, Alert, Clienti, Dispositivi, Altro. 3) PWA manifest.json served correctly. 4) 86NocConnector.zip available for download. Backend connector status endpoint returns data without MongoDB _id field. Firebase push notifications and SendGrid email remain MOCKED.

connectors_page.connector_list: Shows connector cards with status, version, uptime, SNMP traps, syslog counts
